name: Eusan Nation Standard Blueprint Package
desc: A specialized data storage device containing the blueprints of several Eusan Nation ship designs. Majority of the designs inside range from civil to military designs, from engine to weapons. Due to the secrecy and paranoia inherent to the Nation, owning a blueprint package without authorization can net you a long prison sentence or at best, a very hefty fine.

name: Eusan Nation Advanced Blueprint Package
desc: A specialized data storage device containing the blueprints of several advanced Eusan Nation ship designs. Majority of the designs inside range from next generation battleship hulls to unheard of weapon systems not yet in general fleet use. Due to the secrecy and paranoia inherent to the Nation, owning a blueprint package without authorization can net you a long prison sentence or at best, a very hefty fine
